review_title: WordLift has changed how I do SEO
description: I use WordLift in several SEO projects I run. It is straightforward to create the entries and enrich the content. Always with excellent results.
author: Alexander R.
pros: WordLift makes it easy to work with taxonomies and linked data in SEO. To do the same work, I do myself using WordLift, I would need at least one full-time programmer to implement what I have with the plugin at my disposal. It saves me time and money to do my job.
cons: Here in Brazil, we have a problem with converting the Real to the Euro, which makes it very expensive for companies to hire the system. This is not a problem with WordLift, but with the situation, we live in here.

review_title: Turn your site into a Knowledge Gragh
author: massimiliano G.
pros: The thing I like most about the tool is the amazing way it integrates different features and makes use of NLP algorithms. If you are interested in Semantic publishing, entity SEO, and publishing content adhering to the core standards of the semantic web WordLift is really unrivaled. WordLift is not just a plugin or a SaaS but a whole ecosystem made of APIs, sheet add-ons, Streamlit apps that support every step of semantic publishing and use the best Machine Learning solutions to support this activity also at the level of site analysis (topic analysis, gap analysis). I have to say something about the support is amazing too. I had advanced configuration needs to make it work together with other plugins and for days the WordLift team supported me via SLACK providing me with all the filters and hocks until everything worked perfectly.
cons: some minor elements of the UI should be improved.

review_title: Helps Me To Improve My Content Better
description: WordLift has been an incredibly useful tool to manage our website's SEO strategy. We appreciate the user-friendly interface which allowed us to quickly and efficiently optimize pages for search engine friendliness. The automated processes eliminated manual labor, saving us time and money. What truly impressed us is the personalized customer support we received from the WordLift team – they quickly responded with helpful advice and solutions whenever we had questions or issues. In summary, using WordLift was an overall positive experience that gave us peace of mind knowing that our website was in good hands.
author: Sarfaraz K.
pros: After looking for a software solution to help optimize our website, we decided to give WordLift a try. We found that the user-centric design made it very easy to grasp the core features and understand how they could benefit us. The AI-driven content suggestion engine also proved invaluable, saving our team time while improving the quality of content we produced. In addition, the integration with external applications and platforms allowed us to work more efficiently while optimizing our performance. All in all, we have been very impressed with WordLift and happily recommend it to other businesses looking for an efficient way to improve their website's performance.
cons: Despite all its strengths, I found WordLift's user interface hard to use and it lacked some of the advanced content analysis functions that I look for in similar software. The insights WordLift provided could be inaccurate, since the database was quite limited compared to its competitors and the content recommendations did not have a lot of flexibility in terms of customization options. Additionally, the pricing was higher than other software I had used before and there were some bugs that hampered my experience with the program, making it far less enjoyable than other programs with which I was familiar.

review_title: Bringing Your Content to The Next Level
description: I have a very simple business case opening a small new blog implementing WordLift together with other SEO tools. Traffic is the only goal for now No site authority, no link building, no well-known brand name. Just content. Even then I am already competing with very authoritative information sources in the SERPs. And I am getting a featured snippet from time to time. This is not a miracle, and it takes some months to get there. But the value of telling Google what you really are up to by easy implemented semantic markup got a true value. Obviously, things must work together. To make my plugins to work the best I have invested in a quality WordPress theme and serious hosting as well.
author: Kim R.
pros: Working with WordPress the WordLift plugin makes semantic markup ad entity marketing very easy. I can do all that is needed in one window while I am working on the visible content for my users. Even the suggestions supplied from WordLift can help me to develop new content. Often by inspiring different or new perspectives that can produce more interesting new content. A new post for the blog, for social media or the newsletter.
cons: I do not believe in easy wins and even WordLift has given my more benefits to my SEO goals. But even then, you must expect to invest some time in the tool and what it can do for you. Implementing WordLift in a WordPress blog is no big deal but getting the real value from the tool is an ongoing process. WordLift is not only a money investment. It is also an investment in time to get knowledge and experience about how the technical features can affect your content production and publication for the better.

review_title: Automates SEO and building of knowledge graphs for large content sites
description: Excellent, responsive and most importantly: effective
author: Durjoy Ace B.
pros: I'm not even sure how we would be able to work on our site without Wordlift, the tool is a valuable part of our SEO and content arsenal.
cons: There is a learning curve around how the system works- it's not your father's SEO tool.

review_title: Building an Immensely Powerful Knowledge Graph from a Wordpress Site
description: Wordlift has enabled me to better organise my website content. That means the experience for my website visitors is better ( average session length is much longer), and we are making great progress in terms of both organic traffic from Google and visibility in its SERPs. Lastly, using Wordlift in combination with Kalicube Pro, I have been able to push Entity SEO to new levels. Leveraging Wordlift's structured data, we have been able to educate Google effectively and efficiently and build the Entity Identity of hundreds of entities.
author: Jason B.
pros: Installation was easy. Initial configuration is simple. Once you have taken the time to build your internal Knowledge Graph properly, Wordlift is incredibly powerful and it changes the way you perceive your own content, and how you present it to your audience (100 times better :)
cons: Building the Knowledge graph can be a little confusing. However, this is more to do with our own understanding of our own content, and out human inability to be 100% consistent when labelling a dataset. Recent updates to Wordlift have, however, made this problem significantly lighter, which is great !

review_title: A fantastic plugin that's easy to use
description: We're aware that structured data is very important in helping Google better understand our content and we wanted to unlock more SERP features in Google to benefit from higher CTRs and stand out from the competition. WordLift has helped us to achieve this and the team has provided great support and advice to help us get the most from our structured data strategy.
author: Sam G.
pros: WordLift covers a huge number of schemas, providing us with the means to add many different types of markup to our different content types. This has allowed us to make our content eligible for a number of Google SERP features, from video structured data that helps our pages appear in Google's video search results, to FAQ schema, which allows our FAQs to appear below our search listings, giving us more real estate in the SERPs, leading to more traffic. WordLift are also always looking for new ways to improve the plugin and we've been able to try out new features to better streamline the process of marking up our content.
cons: We had a few minor teething problems getting everything set up, but WordLift have been working closely to fix any issues.

review_title: Scaling Semantic SEO
description: It's been a great partnership. They have invested time and energy to help me succeed. They listen to our user input and continue to make the tool more and more valuable.
author: Ryan S.
pros: The tool makes scaling our semantic SEO efforts much more manageable. The support team is awesome. You get more than a tool. You get a team of people to help make sure you succeed in your goals.
cons: There is a bit of a learning curve, but once you get the process down you're good to go!

review_title: One of the most usefull tool for SEO
author: Roberto S.
pros: Without mincing words Wordlift is one of the best tools on the market for creating [SENSITIVE CONTENT] markup. Thanks to its use it is possible to catalog the entities directly in the page on my blog [SENSITIVE CONTENT] at [SENSITIVE CONTNET]
cons: nothing i am really satisfied with this software and as a seo consultant i really wouldn't know how to improve it

review_title: Best partner in SEO
author: 🕶️ Federico R.
pros: Support provided by the wordlift team to create adhoc customization
cons: The integration requires IT skills that our comapny struggled to provide

review_title: La polizza di assicurazione sulla SEO del futuro
description: Pubblicare dati interconnessi, curare il proprio knowledge graph sono investimenti per futuro il cui primo frutto è una SEO eccellente. Ma i veri vantaggi si riveleranno col tempo e con l'evoluzione del machine learning all'interno dei motori di ricerca, degli assistenti e di tutte le tecnologie che usiamo ogni giorno.
author: Matteo C.
pros: Con WordLift oggi puoi fare la SEO di domani e di dopo-domani. Aggiungere i dati strutturati è noioso e ormai lo fanno tutti. Con WordLift invece crei linked data: dati interconnessi che non solo sono strutturati, ma che parlano ai motori di ricerca. Con WordLift ottengo dei piazzamenti organici a cui altrimenti non avrei mai avuto accesso. Senza fare link building, senza chiedere guest post, ma lavorando sulla curatela dei miei dati.
cons: WordLift si basa su una tecnologia molto potente. Il team è in crescita, ma la UX è ancora molto tecnica e richiede una curva di apprendimento piuttosto ripida. Il supporto sempre puntuale e gentile del team però rende questa scalata meno difficoltosa.

review_title: Amazing Plugin For Schema and Entity Sculpting
description: Wordlift has been great to use so far, with some excellent support from the team.
author: Mike L.
pros: The ability to add schema to tag archive pages, and use that to tie in entities into my articles when those tags are used. No other plugin can do this - and Wordlift does a great job of it.
cons: I'd like to further sculpt some entities and define them with additional properties - such as the parentOrganization of my Organization. Wordlift is a bit limited with the properties I can add when adding an entity.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The power of AI on my website
description: I don't have to worry anymore about my structured datas. It is always perfect and I know that Google understand precisely what my post or page is about. It is really good for my ranking and traffic.
author: Stéphane V.
pros: It is a mind changing for me. I didn't realized how complex it is to send the right signals to Google before I've started using WordLift. When the process is understood, all the work can be done easily on exixting and new articles. I love the smoth use of the plugin. Moreover, Gennaro was of great help showing me what I can achieve with their plugin, even during the trial period.
cons: Theree is really nothing I don't love. For me the only drawback at first was that I didn't know anything about the semantic markups, and then I didn't know what the plugin could do for me. Happily I have found some useful videos from WordLift ;)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best tool to write editorial content that Google loves
description: The plugin really helps me to write better content. I don’t have to worry about the right keywords to use, because WordLift takes care of that for me. I can focus on writing great content and the plugin will make sure that my content is optimized for Google.
author: Annachiara A.
pros: WordLift has been a great help for me in writing new content. The plugin allows me to easily add structured data to my content, which makes it easier for Google to understand and index my content.
cons: There is really nothing I don’t like. The only thing is that I wish I had discovered WordLift sooner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Buon prodotto
author: Bruno B.
pros: hA aiutato parecchio nella crescita del progetto
cons: Diciamo poco per fortuna. Sarebbe bello essere seguiti di più :)

review_title: Un approccio diverso alla SEO e alla scrittura per il web
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Wordlift ha un approccio diverso rispetto ad altri plugin SEO e permette di avere una visione 360% dei piani editoriali da sviluppare per il blog del proprio sito e per le varie pagine. Integrato con altri strumenti può essere un risorsa per crescere in termini di traffico e posizionamento.
cons: Non è sempre facile spiegare ai collaboratori come funziona il plugin.

review_title: Great team
author: Giancarlo F.
pros: The team are world class and the software is best of breed
cons: Nothing to complain, we like the software

review_title: Easy way to add Knowledge Graph schema to your site
description: Excellent way to improve your sites SEO
author: Zunaid K.
pros: I like how easy it was to connect Google Sheets to your Google Search console and pull all the data into the sheet where it was easy to use. The confidence measure of which schema to add was also very useful
cons: Nothing in particular. It does require the installation of a Google Sheet Add-on but the instructions were very clearly laid out.

review_title: An innovative and useful product for publishers and content websites
description: Quite positive. This is extremely recommended if you have a lot of tags and categories and have to make sense of them. I hadn't had the chance to test it on a large website but the technical foundations are the same. It's all about being able to create the right structure and markup for your website.
author: Marco G.
pros: The opportunity to augment my website with additional data that help search engines understand my topics.
cons: At first, I had a few issues figuring out how to implement a particular type of markup. After reading their tutorial, it was quite clear.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Controla las entidades de tu contenido
description: Un punto muy positivo es que puedes crear y editar tus propias entidades en función de los contenidos.
author: Pablo P.
pros: Facilita la visualización de las entidades más relevantes en el contenido y lo hace directamente sobre el editor de WordPress, lo cual resulta una ventaja y nos hace ganar tiempo.
cons: El precio me parece algo elevado teniendo en cuenta que el plan más básico es para gestionar los contenidos de una sola web.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Allows us to help search engines to understand our content better
description: Implemented it on an article that wasn't doing well for the target keyword, even though it was the only page targeting that exact term on the internet. So, as soon as I used WordLift to mention the entities that were in the exact term, the rankings started increasing, and the article went from 12th to 2nd position.
author: Ishaan S.
pros: It's easy to get started with. Plus, you can add a lot of entities instantly.
cons: It creates a lot of pages in vocabulary at first, so it needs to be set up carefully.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It allows me to highlight the usefulness of my product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very simple to use and analyze SEO I think the impact on acquisition will be significant
cons: No onboardingand complicated to follow how the integration works at first
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wordlift is the future of SEO
description: This is one of the best SEO applications out there. I recommend this to all those who are looking for an excellent SEO application. Its AI system works amazingly with your marketing needs.
author: Francis Rod D.
pros: Its AI system made it one of the best SEO applications out there.
cons: There is nothing wrong with the application. It works fine
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
